## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX and Surge AI's potential sponsorship of a NeurIPS Happy Hour event organized by Google DeepMind.](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Event details: \~80-100 attendees, primarily researchers and PhD students, at Punchbowl Social venue (3-6 PM)](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Surge AI interested in being sole sponsor/co-host, buying out the entire event](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Next steps: Organizer to send one-pager agreement, W9, and additional event details; Surge AI to confirm full sponsorship](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

## Topics

### Event Overview and Audience

  - [First NeurIPS event outside Google Gemini](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Smaller event size (\~80-100 people) due to visa issues](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Audience: Researchers, PhD students, computer scientists interested in or working at big labs](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Invite list targeting rising stars and their networks, aiming for 150 invites to ensure \~80 attendees](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)

### Venue and Activities

  - [Location: Punchbowl Social (activity-based venue similar to Dave & Buster's)](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Activities: Bowling (3-6 lanes), table games, poker, bar area](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Timing: 3-6 PM happy hour](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Two drink tickets per person included](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Sponsorship Details

  - [Surge AI interested in being sole sponsor/co-host](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Opportunity for co-branding and increased presence](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Sponsorship would cover event costs, not venue buyout](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [Organizer to handle guest list and logistics](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)

### Additional Events

  - [Separate NeurIPS dinners (mostly booked)](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [AI and research community mixer happening tonight (potential for Surge AI SF office to attend)](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Organizer to send one-pager agreement including fulfillment requirements and financial details](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Organizer to provide W9 and additional paperwork](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Surge AI to confirm full event sponsorship](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Surge AI to review and approve agreement](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [Organizer to secure venue space upon confirmation](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Surge AI to potentially send SF office representatives to tonight's mixer event](https://fathom.video/share/CTEyMur29MxywDuH4-5im3_16Vmt6CBc?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
